description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a thick, wood-textured tabletop and sturdy black metal legs in a T-shaped configuration. The tabletop features a rich, medium-brown finish with visible wood grain patterns, giving it a warm and natural appearance. There are four rectangular cable management grommets, two on each side near the back corners, allowing for organized routing of wires and cables. The legs are robust, flat, and powder-coated, providing stability and a contemporary industrial look. The desk has a minimalist design with no drawers or shelves, emphasizing functionality and open legroom. Its overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both work and study environments.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a wood-textured top, black metal T-legs, and four cable management grommets. The design is minimalist and sturdy, ideal for work or study.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wood-textured tabletop, both T-shaped black metal legs, and two cable grommets on each back corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, thickness of the tabletop, and the profile of one T-shaped leg with visible cable grommets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the tabletop, both legs, and the placement of all four cable grommets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's depth, tabletop thickness, and the other T-shaped leg with cable grommets visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with unobstructed legroom and cable grommets at the back corners, indicating the front is the side without any structural obstructions.
